name: Bisalloy Steel Group Limited
analysis: BIS's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$4.4900, stop A$4.2768, target A$5.0600 (2.67:1) — then trail it.
